title: Hunt is Now Open
description: A cinematic vertical slideshow announcing the opening of Hunt, with broad atmospheric scenes and generous safe space for overlay text.
style: Premium Vorinthex AI: obsidian black, polished chrome, dark glass, subtle volumetric lighting, cinematic sci-fi realism, premium enterprise aesthetic, minimalist composition, mobile-first 9:16, consistent visual language across every slide, broad atmospheric imagery rather than specific literal objects, generous empty space for overlay text, keep important subjects away from all edges, preserve at least 18 percent clean margin at top and bottom and 12 percent clean margin on left and right, never render text inside images, no logos, no UI, no watermarks.

slides.title: Hunt is now open.
slides.visual: A quiet cinematic opening scene in the Vorinthex universe. One abstract focal form in the center distance, surrounded by dark space, fog, chrome reflections and ample empty room for overlay text.

slides.title: Explore the Vorinthex Galaxy.
slides.visual: A wide atmospheric discovery scene suggesting a vast galaxy and hidden paths. Keep the composition simple, spacious and cinematic, with no crowded elements near the edges.

slides.title: Collect Intelligence Fragments.
slides.visual: A minimal premium scene implying rare discoveries and collected intelligence through a few abstract luminous forms. Avoid showing many separate items; keep the image calm and spacious.

slides.title: Climb the global leaderboard.
slides.visual: An abstract upward progression scene using dark glass, chrome light, depth and vertical motion cues. Avoid literal UI, readable rankings or detailed interface elements.

slides.title: Earn exclusive launch rewards.
slides.visual: A restrained premium reward reveal with soft light, mystery and negative space. Suggest exclusivity without showing specific reward objects or clutter.

slides.title: The expedition has begun.
slides.visual: A broad cinematic closing vista with distant depth, subtle light and a sense of beginning. Keep the frame uncluttered, with the main energy centered and far from the edges.
